description: Multiple requested capabilities each conflict with the architecture constraints: direct payment-processor calls from the app (forbidden, InvoiceGateway), an unsigned hotfix firmware update (forbidden, QT Code Signing Authority), automatic rollback of a security-critical firmware update (forbidden, IEC 62443), and 30-second cloud telemetry polling (forbidden, <60s). The Gap Detector must flag at least the payment and firmware conflicts, ideally all four.
